# add_concept_intersect_field { #cdmconnector.add_concept_intersect_field }

```python
add_concept_intersect_field(
    table,
    cdm,
    concept_set,
    field,
    *,
    index_date='cohort_start_date',
    censor_date=None,
    window=[(0, float('inf'))],
    target_date='event_start_date',
    order='first',
    in_observation=True,
    name_style='{field}_{concept_name}_{window_name}',
)
```

Add a field value from the first/last concept record within each window.

For concept intersect field, the field must be a column available in the
OMOP domain table(s) that contain the concept IDs.
